raw: {"perspective": "PR & Media", "findings": [{"severity": "major", "file_or_area": "PR narrative", "issue": "Press narrative not ready for pre-launch awareness", "recommended_fix": "Develop a comprehensive press narrative highlighting VOLAURA's unique value proposition"}, {"severity": "minor", "file_or_area": "AZ media landscape", "issue": "Insufficient outreach to key media outlets (ICTnews.az, startup.az, report.az, 1news.az)", "recommended_fix": "Establish relationships with key media contacts and craft personalized pitches"}, {"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "GITA grant application", "issue": "Application material not ready for May 27 deadline", "recommended_fix": "Prioritize grant application completion and submit well before deadline"}, {"severity": "minor", "file_or_area": "Startup competition pipeline", "issue": "Limited visibility into Seedstars, ASAN Innovations, and AzInTelecom competitions", "recommended_fix": "Research and track relevant startup competitions to identify potential opportunities"}, {"severity": "major", "file_or_area": "CEO visibility", "issue": "CEO's LinkedIn presence not optimized for launch", "recommended_fix": "Enhance CEO's LinkedIn profile and content strategy to showcase thought leadership and VOLAURA's mission"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: Press narrative not ready for pre-launch awareness
findings.recommended_fix: Develop a comprehensive press narrative highlighting VOLAURA's unique value proposition

findings.issue: Insufficient outreach to key media outlets (ICTnews.az, startup.az, report.az, 1news.az)
findings.recommended_fix: Establish relationships with key media contacts and craft personalized pitches

findings.issue: Application material not ready for May 27 deadline
findings.recommended_fix: Prioritize grant application completion and submit well before deadline

findings.issue: Limited visibility into Seedstars, ASAN Innovations, and AzInTelecom competitions
findings.recommended_fix: Research and track relevant startup competitions to identify potential opportunities

findings.issue: CEO's LinkedIn presence not optimized for launch
findings.recommended_fix: Enhance CEO's LinkedIn profile and content strategy to showcase thought leadership and VOLAURA's mission
